"But will my groom actually use his checklist?" 💍

We tested it with real grooms — and yes. Because it answers everything they never knew they had to do:

  • What to buy for his wedding outfits (and when)
  • When exactly to book the officiant
  • When to go to the barber
  • His own wedding-day & honeymoon packing lists
  • Countdown tasks: 2 months, 45, 30, 15, 7… down to 1 day before
And if he still doesn't open it? You keep it — and use it to assign him his tasks, one by one, and tick them off together. Either way, nothing gets forgotten.
